name_en: 🌹🌹🌹MCM Kelly mini shoulder bag showcases MCM's long history and tradition. A fashionable and elegant style, with a top handle design, a front flap with a turn-lock closure, and an adjustable single-shoulder strap. A classic reproduction made of iconic Visetos print coated canvas, with gold hardware enhancing the exquisite beauty. Dimensions: 18x15x10cm
